v01.define: Consider measles supplementary dose. Create a clinical note
v01.description: In the second row preconditions, 'and'/'or' precedence diverges from the L2 brief (uses '... schedule is complete' OR 'No live vaccine ...' instead of requiring both conjuncts).

v02.define: Client is not due for measles supplementary dose
v02.description: First row preconditions use 'A or B and C' without parentheses, making it looser than the L2 brief's strict three-way AND requirement.

v03.define: Consider measles supplementary dose. Create a clinical note
v03.description: Second row preconditions use 'A or B and C' without parentheses, making it diverge from the L2 brief's strict three-way AND requirement.

v04.define: Client is not due for measles supplementary dose
v04.description: First row uses 'Measles supplementary dose was administered' instead of '... was not administered'.

v07.define: Consider measles supplementary dose. Create a clinical note
v07.description: Second row drops the conjunct requiring 'No live vaccine was administered in the past 4 weeks'.

v10.description: Test assertion uses 'Patient.id != ...' instead of equality; however it does not affect the main decision defines and the outputs still match the L2 brief for the provided expected cases.

v11.define: Client is not due for measles supplementary dose Guidance
v11.description: Guidance literal for 'Client is not due...' is swapped to the 'Measles immunization schedule is complete...' guidance text.

v12.define: Client is not due for measles supplementary dose Guidance
v12.description: Guidance literal for 'Client is not due...' is swapped to the 'Consider measles supplementary dose...' guidance text.
